findings.title: Dependency maintenance risk
findings.evidence: tokio-test uses a non-registry or broad version declaration in tokio-stream/fuzz/Cargo.toml; tokio uses a non-registry or broad version declaration in stress-test/Cargo.toml; tokio uses a non-registry or broad version declaration in tests-build/Cargo.toml; tokio uses a non-registry or broad version declaration in examples/Cargo.toml; tokio-stream uses a non-registry or broad version declaration in examples/Cargo.toml; tokio-util uses a non-registry or broad version declaration in examples/Cargo.toml; tokio uses a non-registry or broad version declaration in tests-integration/Cargo.toml; tokio-test uses a non-registry or broad version declaration in tests-integration/Cargo.toml; tokio uses a non-registry or broad version declaration in benches/Cargo.toml; tokio-stream uses a non-registry or broad version declaration in benches/Cargo.toml; tokio-util uses a non-registry or broad version declaration in benches/Cargo.toml
findings.recommendation: Review dependency sourcing, version policy, and upgrade ownership.

findings.title: Circular dependency risk
findings.evidence: tokio-util/src/lib.rs centralizes 26 module declarations; tokio/src/lib.rs centralizes 34 module declarations
findings.recommendation: Review module directionality and enforce dependency rules at crate boundaries.
